utterance: is this part compatible with my fridge?
notes: RECORD ONLY (owner-requested): no explicit model in the utterance, only a vague 'my fridge' + a model in session. OBSERVED 2026-06-12 live Haiku 4.5 router -> ['compatibility'] (it treats 'this part ... compatible with my fridge' as a compatibility question even with no explicit model token, relying on session current_model). Full graph then ran check_compatibility(PS11752778, WDT780SAEM1) -> NO (real verdict; fridge bin vs dishwasher), Sonnet narrated grounded, validator clean. Takeaway: the tightened router still fires compatibility on a vague appliance noun once a part+model are in session; the deterministic tool supplies the verdict, so no hallucination risk.
